data.title: Over 500 students to showcase school choice at the Robinson Center in Little Rock on Jan. 28, 2026. #SchoolChoice #LittleRock.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, over 500 students hailing from various locations in Arkansas will convene at the Robinson Center in Little Rock. Their purpose is clear: to express their appreciation for school choice and affection for their educational institutions. The event will highlight a variety of K-12 options available to students in the state, showcasing the diverse educational opportunities.

data.title: Helios HVACR partners with Bluon to deploy AI nationwide, providing real-time diagnostics to technicians across 40+ states.
data.description: Top commercial HVACR company introduces advanced AI diagnostics and equipment intelligence for technicians in over 40 states. Based in Irvine, California, Bluon, Inc. unveiled the innovative service on January 12, 2026. The platform offers real-time support and insights, revolutionizing the industry with cutting-edge technology.

data.title: LiquiDonate unveils 2026 returns fraud report on e-commerce, urging retailers to address financial losses.
data.description: A recent study uncovered a surge in return-related fraud within the e-commerce sector. This report highlights the importance for retailers to address this issue in order to minimize financial losses. LiquiDonate, a retail-tech firm based in San Francisco, released the findings on January 12, 2026. The company specializes in assisting retailers in effectively handling unsellable returns and surplus inventory. The report provides key insights on the rising trend of return fraud in e-commerce, shedding light on strategies that retailers can implement to tackle this growing problem.

data.title: New 2026 ezPaycheck update supports One Big Beautiful Bill for tax compliance. REDMOND, Wash., Jan. 12, 2026 /PRNewswire - Halfpricesoft.com enhances software to aid businesses.
data.description: Aided by recent improvements, businesses can now ensure compliance and back the implementation of The One Big Beautiful Bill. Recently, Halfpricesoft.com in REDMOND, Wash. announced enhancements to its ezPaycheck software on January 12, 2026. These modifications come as tax laws evolve post the passage of The One Big Beautiful Bill, reflecting the company's commitment to helping businesses stay updated.

data.title: AZIO AI secures $100M govt purchase orders, advances $200M regional pipeline, plans U.S. AI infrastructure expansion.
data.description: The pace of execution has picked up steam after the government revenue reached $100 million and a merger framework with Envirotech Vehicles (NASDAQ: EVTV) was revealed at $3.00 per share. The event took place in Los Angeles on Jan. 12, 2026. AZIO AI, in collaboration with Azio Corp, a cutting-edge artificial intelligence company...

data.title: Haisco grants AirNexis global rights to HSK39004 drug in deal exceeding USD 1 billion, targeting COPD market.
data.description: A dual-target therapy known as HSK39004 is set to enter the competitive global market for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) treatment. This innovative product signifies a focus on international capabilities and advancement. The announcement was made by Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. on January 9, 2026. The company, identified by Ticker Code 002653, aims to make a significant impact in the field, showcasing their dedication to addressing respiratory issues on a global scale.

data.title: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) to acquire Valencia Technologies Corp, expanding urology offerings for overactive bladder. Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX), disclosed its acquisition plan on January 12, 2026, via PRNewswire. The acquisition involves Valencia Technologies Corporation and aims to broaden urology offerings for individuals dealing with overactive bladder. This strategic move highlights Boston Scientific Corporation's commitment to expanding its market presence in the urology sector. The acquisition deal signifies a significant step in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: TGI Fridays aims for 1,000+ units and $2 billion revenue by 2030. Phil Broad to lead global expansion.
data.description: Renowned company sets ambitious goal to reach over 1,000 locations and achieve $2 billion in revenue by 2030. Phil Broad, a seasoned professional in the hospitality industry, has been appointed to spearhead the worldwide expansion efforts. The well-known establishment, TGI Fridays, made this significant announcement on January 12, 2026, showcasing their commitment to growth and success in the coming years.

data.title: EDETEK CEO to present at 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference about AI-powered R&D Cloud Ecosystem.
data.description: EDETEK Inc., a renowned company in digital clinical platforms and AI solutions, based in Princeton, N.J., revealed on Jan. 12, 2026, that their Chief Executive Officer, Jian Chen, shared their commitment to accelerating clinical development through their AI-powered R&D cloud ecosystem. This initiative aims to enhance clinical trials and research processes globally. This advancement is significant for the industry as EDETEK Inc. is a leader in the field.

data.title: Waystar introduces Agentic AI to improve revenue cycle, preventing $15.5 billion in denials in under one year using 7.5 billion transactions and 1 in 3 US hospital discharges.
data.description: Waystar AltitudeAI continues to make a significant impact by preventing denials worth $15.5 billion within a year. This is achieved through a distinctive approach using data from over 7.5 billion transactions annually and covering a third of U.S. hospital discharges. The collaboration between LEHI, Utah, and LOUISVILLE, Ky. on this initiative has proved successful, as announced on Jan. 12.

data.title: Sports nutrition market to hit USD 53.42 billion by 2031 with 8.18% CAGR, starting from USD 36.06 billion in 2026.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 12, 2026, the sports nutrition market has been assessed by Mordor Intelligence to be valued at USD 36.06 billion. Projections indicate that it is set to increase to USD 53.42 billion by 2031, displaying a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.18%. This growth trend highlights the continuous expansion of the market as more people adopt active lifestyles.

data.title: Aclaris starts Phase 1b trial for Atopic Dermatitis with ATI-052, a novel bispecific antibody.
data.description: Aclaris has started a Phase 1b trial to assess the efficacy of its novel Bispecific Antibody ATI-052 in Atopic Dermatitis (AD). This trial aims to test the potential of the drug in treating AD. The company is conducting this proof-of-concept trial to gather data on the drug's performance and safety profile. This marks a significant step forward in Aclaris' research and development efforts, with hopes high for the success of ATI-052 in managing AD. The Phase 1b trial will involve a specific number of participants and will provide crucial insights into the drug's effectiveness.

data.title: NuScale Power study in Oregon shows its technology supports profitable, reliable power for chemical plants.
data.description: In Corvallis, Oregon, NuScale Power unveiled findings from a study indicating that their technology can provide dependable and profitable power for chemical plants. The study highlights the viability of NuScale's technology in supporting the energy needs of chemical plants.

data.title: DAHON and IDEAL Bike partner for green mobility. DAHON TECH (Stock Code: 02543.HK) & Ideal Bike Corp (Stock Code: 8933) collaborate.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 12, 2026, DAHON TECH (HKEX Stock Code: 02543.HK), a top folding bicycle manufacturer, and Ideal Bike Corp (TPEx Stock Code: 8933) marked a significant collaboration. The two companies signed a strategic cooperation agreement at DAHON's headquarters, demonstrating a pivotal moment in their partnership.

data.title: Synthetic Feed Additives Market projected to reach $44.46 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.6%.
data.description: In January 12, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the Synthetic Feed Additives Market is expected to increase from USD 33.88 billion in 2025 to USD 44.46 billion by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.6% over the forecast period.

data.title: US Foods affirms FY2025 guidance with 4-5% sales growth, 10-12% EBITDA growth, 24-26% EPS growth. Attending ICR Conference.
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp. (NYSE: USFD) confirmed its fiscal year 2025 guidance during the 28th Annual ICR Conference. The company reiterates its projections for the fiscal year, as initially stated on Nov. 6, 2025. The outlook for Fiscal Year 2025 includes: a Net Sales growth of 4% to 5%, Adjusted EBITDA growth of 10% to 12%, and Adjusted Diluted EPS growth of 24% to 26%. US Foods remains committed to these targets as communicated during the conference.
